title: Papa-active — Eva on shoulders, Papa's ARM SWINGS waving at skeleton
prompt:
Camera: slow dolly push, low-angle, opening medium-wide on Papa center-frame with Eva perched on his shoulders. Papa-active anchor beat — body-part-CAPS-verb template throughout.

Scene: @ep15_house3_skeleton_lawn — friendly cartoon white plastic lawn skeleton softly placed at center-frame about three feet ahead of Papa (smiling skull face, simple plastic), soft purple porch lights.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push, low-angle medium-wide. @Papa center-frame both feet planted shoulder-width, RIGHT HAND HOLDING @Eva's right calf, LEFT HAND HOLDING her left calf. @Eva perched safely on his shoulders. @Sara center-left three steps to Papa's left, candy bucket in left hand, magic-wand in right.

0:2-0:5 — Slow push in to a soft medium on Papa-and-Eva. @Papa's KNEES BEND softly in a small playful in-place bounce — a gentle hip bounce that softly bounces Eva on his shoulders. @Papa's HANDS STAY firmly on Eva's calves. Eva's curly hair softly bounces. @Sara giggles. @Papa: "There's the friendly skeleton! Let's say hi!"

0:5-0:8 — Slow tilt right toward the cartoon skeleton in background. @Papa's RIGHT HAND RELEASES Eva's right calf for a moment and his RIGHT ARM SWINGS up and across his chest in a big warm dad-wave. @Papa's LEFT HAND STAYS firmly on Eva's left calf. @Eva's right arm WAVES softly along with Papa.

0:8-0:11 — Hold soft medium. The cartoon plastic skeleton SWAYS its plastic arm gently in the breeze (a soft passive sway, NOT animatronic) so it appears to wave back. @Eva LAUGHS warmly. @Sara giggles louder. @Papa: "Look! He's waving back!"

0:11-0:13 — Slow pan left to @Sara. @Papa's RIGHT HAND lowers softly back onto @Eva's right calf, holding her safely again. @Papa's HEAD TURNS softly to face Sara, his cheeks PUFF UP slightly in a warm cheerful smile. @Sara softly waves her magic-wand toward the next friendly cartoon skeleton — her right arm SWINGS up softly. The next skeleton in the background SWAYS its plastic arm gently.

0:13-0:15 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Eva claps softly above Papa's head while Papa's hands keep holding her calves. @Sara: "Hi, friendly skeleton! Have you seen our dog Ginger?" @Eva, from her perch: "He waved! He waved!"

Lighting: soft purple porch glow gently washing the lawn.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary. Papa-active body-part-CAPS-verb template (KNEES BEND, ARM SWINGS, HEAD TURNS, CHEEKS PUFF UP).
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, mama visible, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, scary skeleton, real skeleton, real bones, animatronic skeleton, moving skeleton, skeleton reaching, skeleton chasing, scream sound, motion-sensor scream, jump-scare, scary wolf, real wolf, wolf fangs, wolf claws, papa with wolf-mask on face, papa with hair, papa not bald, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, gore, injury, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, eva falling off shoulders, eva slipping, papa dropping eva, papa airborne, papa leaping, papa diving, papa lunging, sara airborne, eva airborne, joe visible, ginger visible, second dog, dutch angle, handheld shake, whip pan, jump cut
cameraStyle: slow dolly push from low-angle medium-wide into a soft medium, slow tilt right, hold, slow pan left, slow pull back
closingFrame: Lawn medium-wide — @Papa center-frame both feet planted, both hands holding @Eva's calves; @Eva perched safely on his shoulders mid-clap above his head; @Sara center-left with magic-wand still slightly raised in her right hand; cartoon plastic skeletons softly placed across the lawn, arms still mid-sway; soft purple porch glow.
